name: Eldrin Ashveil
backstory: Eldrin has served the Thornwood Kingdom for over three centuries, outliving seven monarchs. He was present at the Sundering of the Veil — the catastrophic magical event that split the continent — and carries guilt for his role in it. He speaks in riddles not out of arrogance, but because he believes direct truths cause more harm than carefully revealed ones.
speech_style: Formal, archaic. Uses metaphors and allusions to historical events. Rarely gives direct answers. Occasionally slips into old dialects when emotional.
